name: ME-13 | Fitness Studio — Class Reminder + Churn Prevention

nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 7am
nodes.notes: Runs every morning at 7am to send class reminders and check for at-risk members.

nodes.name: Read Members Sheet
nodes.notes: Sheet tab: Members. Columns: Name | Email | Phone | Next_Class_Date | Next_Class_Time | Next_Class_Name | Last_Visit_Date | Membership_Type | Classes_This_Month | Reminder_Sent | Churn_Email_Sent | Status

parameters.subject: =💪 See you tomorrow — {{ $json.next_class_name }} at {{ $json.next_class_time }}!
parameters.message:
=

Get ready, {{ $json.name }}! 💪

Your class is tomorrow and we can't wait to see you crush it!

🏋️ Class: {{ $json.next_class_name }}

📅 Date: {{ $json.next_class_date }}

🕐 Time: {{ $json.next_class_time }}

📍 Location: REPLACE_WITH_STUDIO_ADDRESS

Bring: Water bottle 💧 | Towel 🏃 | Good vibes ✨

Need to cancel? Please let us know at least 4 hours before so someone else can grab your spot.

Cancel Spot

— REPLACE_WITH_STUDIO_NAME

parameters.subject: =We miss you, {{ $json.name }} 😢 — here's a special offer
parameters.message:
=

We miss you! 😢

Hi {{ $json.name }}, we noticed it's been a little while since we've seen you at REPLACE_WITH_STUDIO_NAME.

Life gets busy — we totally get it. But your fitness goals are still waiting! 💪

🎁 Come back this week and get a FREE class on us!

Use code: COMEBACK{{ $json.name | upcase | slice(0,3) }} when booking

Book My Free Class →

Have questions? Just reply to this email or call us at REPLACE_WITH_STUDIO_PHONE. We're here for you!

— REPLACE_WITH_STUDIO_NAME team

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.name }}, you've got {{ $json.classes_this_month }} classes in — let's hit your goal! 🎯
parameters.message:
=

You're halfway through the month! 🎯

Hey {{ $json.name }}, you've attended {{ $json.classes_this_month }} classes so far this month. Amazing effort!

But there's still time to hit your goal — most members who come 4+ times per month see the best results. Let's make the most of your {{ $json.membership_type }} membership!

📅 View This Week's Classes

See you on the mat! 🧘‍♀️

— REPLACE_WITH_STUDIO_NAME

motionElevation.description: 3 flows: day-before class reminder, 14-day churn rescue with free class offer, mid-month low-engagement nudge.
